name: Otter AI
description: Transcription and meeting-note AI that generates searchable, shareable transcripts and summaries from audio and meetings.

auth_methods.note: Official help article states API access is provisioned for Enterprise customers via sales/account manager; the article does not publish public API docs or list authentication schemes (OAuth2, API key, etc.), so exact auth methods are unclear from public docs.

credential_access.note: Help Center explicitly instructs Enterprise customers to contact sales or account manager to request API access; API access is not available via self-serve signup.

api_surface.note: There is no public REST or GraphQL API documentation on otter.ai or help.otter.ai; the only official page references requesting API access for enterprise customers. Public integrations (Zapier, Zoom, etc.) exist but vendor-hosted API docs are not published.

buildability.note: Without published API endpoints/auth methods and with API access requiring sales provisioning, building against Otter programmatically is blocked for typical developers until enterprise access is granted.

queries: Otter.ai API developer docs site:otter.ai OR site:help.otter.ai "Otter API" "developer" "API" authentication credentials pricing partnership
Otter API partner program site:otter.ai integrations partners
